ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation of the study */,
  "study_population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population studied */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the study was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_study_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rrso_uptake" (
  "rrso_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RRSO uptake record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "uptake_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that underwent RRSO */,
  "risk_reduction_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of risk reduction due to RRSO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rrso_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rrso_uptake_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rrso_uptake_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gynecologic_screening" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gynecologic screening record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "screening_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening method */,
  "uptake_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that underwent the screening method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gynecologic_screening_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gynecologic_screening_screening_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("screening_method_id") REFERENCES screening_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gynecologic_screening_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "mean_months" REAL /* Mean follow-up duration in months */,
  "range_months" TEXT /* Range of follow-up duration in months */,
  "follow_up_method" TEXT /* Method used for follow-up (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for inclusion in the population */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for exclusion from the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the screening method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screening method */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the screening method */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the screening method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date of the agreement */,
  "agreement_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_agreements_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_records" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_records_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irb_approvals" (
  "irb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IRB approval */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "irb_date" TEXT /* Date of IRB approval */,
  "irb_status" TEXT /* Status of IRB approval (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irb_approvals_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
